title: Living World
description: A mod that aims to expand on the lackluster exploration, immersion, and looting of Minecraft!
body:
## Welcome to the Living World!
Living world is a mod that expands on Minecrafts lackluster exploration, looting, and immersion. Bringing forth new blocks, tons of structures, "caches", new utilites, mobs. and so much more. 

### Caches

Caches can be found in structures, every cache in a region (example, Arid, Cold, General, Ocean) will have a unique look and loot inside! Killing mobs (or obtaining from chests in the same region) will give you Keys bound to a specific region, able to unlock said regions caches. After consuming said key, the cache will spew up tons of items and lock itself. unable to be opened again ever unless you use a Cache Revitalizer.
